title: Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis electroporation
author: Andrew J. M. Swafford
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.88xhzxn

steps.title: Make 50 mL SM buffer (SM...
steps.instruction: Make 50 mL SM buffer (SM buffer should not be more than 7 days old).

steps.title: SM Buffer
steps.instruction: SM Buffer: 5 mL 50 millimolar (mM), KCL (Autoclaved) 750 µL pH 7.2 1 Molarity (M), Sodium Phosphate Buffer (Filter Sterilized) 7.5 mL 100 millimolar (mM), MgCL2 (filter sterilized) .338 g, Sodium Succinate dibasic acid hexahydrate .228 g, D-Mannitol 36.75 mL, Sterile water

steps.title: Make an appropriate volume of Paraformaldehyde fixation buffer
steps.instruction: Make an appropriate volume of Paraformaldehyde fixation buffer.

steps.title: Make 2mg/mL dextrans in SM buffer...
steps.instruction: Make 2mg/mL dextrans in SM buffer ( Be sure it is Cat No. D3305 from Invitrogen by Thermo Fisher Scientific) dextrans is sticky, measure in the tube you will be adding buffer to. Spin down at high speed, then use supernatant.

steps.title: Measure out the required amount of...
steps.instruction: Measure out the required amount of autoclaved growth media into an appropriate flask.

steps.title: Place fixation buffer, growth media, and bonner's salts on ice
steps.instruction: Place fixation buffer, growth media, and bonner's salts on ice.

steps.title: Transfer synced cells to 50mL conicals
steps.instruction: Transfer synced cells to 50mL conicals

steps.title: Resuspend in 10 mL of SM...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 10 mL of SM buffer, combine after resuspension if multiple tubes were needed to hold all the synced spores.

steps.title: 2500 rpm @ 4 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: 2500 rpm @ 4 °C for 00:05:00 . Discard supernatant immediately.

steps.title: Turn Centrifuge on to 4 °C
steps.instruction: Turn Centrifuge on to 4 °C

steps.title: Resuspend in 5mL of SM
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 5mL of SM

steps.title: Spin down cells and discard supernatant...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells and discard supernatant 2500 rpm, °C @ 4 °C for 00:05:00

steps.title: 2500 rpm @ 4 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: 2500 rpm @ 4 °C for 00:05:00 . Discard supernatant immediately.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in the appropriate volume...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in the appropriate volume of SM buffer needed for the # of cuvettes and tubes that will be used ( 100 µL SM for each cuvette)

steps.title: Count cell concentration
steps.instruction: Count cell concentration. Aiming for 2x10 7 - 1x10 7 cells/mL

steps.title: If the spores are overly concentrated,...
steps.instruction: If the spores are overly concentrated, dilute to the appropriate concentration.

steps.title: Prepare cuvettes & tubes
steps.instruction: Prepare cuvettes & tubes. E- = electroporation control (no voltage) D- = Dextrans control (no dextrans)

steps.title: Prepare E-D- tubes. 1.5mL eppendorfs
steps.instruction: Prepare E-D- tubes. 1.5mL eppendorfs: 100 µL, SM 100 µL, Cell suspension

steps.title: Preprare E-D+ tubes
steps.instruction: Preprare E-D+ tubes: 1.5ml eppendorfs 100 µL, Dextrans solution 100 µL, Cell suspension

steps.title: Prepare E+D- cuvettes
steps.instruction: Prepare E+D- cuvettes: 0.2cm electroporation cuvettes 100 µL, SM 100 µL, Cell suspension

steps.title: Prepare E+D+ cuvettes
steps.instruction: Prepare E+D+ cuvettes: 0.2cm electroporation cuvettes 100 µL, Dextrans solution 100 µL, Cell suspension

steps.title: Set samples on ice for ~ 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Set samples on ice for ~ 10 minutes

steps.title: Set electroporation protocol
steps.instruction: Set electroporation protocol

steps.title: Squarewave protocol 1000V 2 pulses 5 sec intervals 2mm cuvette
steps.instruction: Squarewave protocol 1000V 2 pulses 5 sec intervals 2mm cuvette

steps.title: Insert cuvette
steps.instruction: Insert cuvette

steps.title: Hit the PULSE button, record percent droop
steps.instruction: Hit the PULSE button, record percent droop

steps.title: Remove cuvette and place immediately on ice
steps.instruction: Remove cuvette and place immediately on ice.

steps.title: 00:10:00, allow samples to rest on ice
steps.instruction: 00:10:00, allow samples to rest on ice

steps.title: Add 200 µL, chilled growth media to each cuvette
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL, chilled growth media to each cuvette

steps.title: Gently pipette liquid in cuvette up...
steps.instruction: Gently pipette liquid in cuvette up and down to mix cells just before electroporation

steps.title: 00:10:00, allow samples to rest on ice
steps.instruction: 00:10:00, allow samples to rest on ice

steps.title: Transfer contents of each tube/cuvette to 15mL conicals
steps.instruction: Transfer contents of each tube/cuvette to 15mL conicals.

steps.title: 5 mL, chilled growth media to each sample
steps.instruction: 5 mL, chilled growth media to each sample

steps.title: 2500 rpm 4 °C 00:05:00 discard supernatant
steps.instruction: 2500 rpm 4 °C 00:05:00 discard supernatant

steps.title: go to step #27 Unless supernatant...
steps.instruction: go to step #27 Unless supernatant has been discarded three times.

steps.title: add 5 mL, Bonner's salts
steps.instruction: add 5 mL, Bonner's salts

steps.title: 2500 rpm 4 °C 00:05:00 discard supernatant
steps.instruction: 2500 rpm 4 °C 00:05:00 discard supernatant

steps.title: go to step #30 until supernatant...
steps.instruction: go to step #30 until supernatant as been discarded 2 times

steps.title: Aliquot 100 µL cells for imaging
steps.instruction: Aliquot 100 µL cells for imaging

steps.title: Aliquot 100 µL cells for counting
steps.instruction: Aliquot 100 µL cells for counting

steps.title: Fix remaining cells for flow cytometry
steps.instruction: Fix remaining cells for flow cytometry

steps.title: Repeat steps 18-21 for all cuvettes,...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 18-21 for all cuvettes, be sure to pipette control eppendorf tubes even though they will not be exposed to a pulse.

steps.title: add 600 µL, Bonner's salts 4 °C
steps.instruction: add 600 µL, Bonner's salts 4 °C

steps.title: Add an equal volume of fixation...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of fixation buffer (see go to step #2 ) to each remaining volume of cells.

steps.title: Immediately place tubes on ice
steps.instruction: Immediately place tubes on ice. 00:15:00 (centrifugation time in the following step is IN ADDITION to this time). Leave alone for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge 2200 rpm, °C, @ Room temperature 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 2200 rpm, °C, @ Room temperature 00:05:00

steps.title: Properly dispose of supernatant and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Properly dispose of supernatant and resuspend in 400 µL, Bonner's salts

steps.title: Immediately quantify via flow cytometry or...
steps.instruction: Immediately quantify via flow cytometry or wrap in foil and store at 4 °C for up to 4 hours.

steps.title: Final Concentration of PFA fixation buffer
steps.instruction: Final Concentration of PFA fixation buffer: 4.8% PFA 9mM Sucrose 50mM Sodium Phosphate Buffer, pH 7.2
